response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio matches the conversational exchanges of Fuwamoko and Kuro-chan. No vocal songs are present in this segment. 2. JSON Usage: Fully transcribed and translated using native audio perception, correcting the typo in the previous run's timestamp. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed directly to the character and guest dialogue with precise s/e timestamps.

subtitles.original: おしゃべりパピーぬいぐるみのフワモコだよ！
subtitles.english: It's the Fuwamoko Talking Puppy Plushie!

subtitles.original: ぎゅっとすると、いろいろ喋るよ！
subtitles.english: If you squeeze us, we'll say all kinds of things!

subtitles.original: どんなボイスが出るか、お楽しみに！
subtitles.english: Look forward to hearing what voices we make!

subtitles.original: We have Fuwawa to GO☆Finger Puppet!
subtitles.english: We have Fuwawa to GO☆Finger Puppet!

subtitles.original: Ooh! They both come with one extra Ruffian kigurumi costume you can dress us up in...
subtitles.english: Ooh! They both come with one extra Ruffian kigurumi costume you can dress us up in...

subtitles.original: ...and bring around with you everywhere!
subtitles.english: ...and bring around with you everywhere!

subtitles.original: フワワの指パペット！
subtitles.english: Fuwawa's Finger Puppet!

subtitles.original: どこでも一緒に連れていけるサイズで、着せ替えラフィアンズ衣装もあるよ！
subtitles.english: They're the perfect size to bring anywhere with you, and they come with a dress-up Ruffians costume!

subtitles.original: Finally, we have two different ASMR Voice Packs! "Back from a Fluffy Date" with Fuwawa...
subtitles.english: Finally, we have two different ASMR Voice Packs! "Back from a Fluffy Date" with Fuwawa...

subtitles.original: ...and "Sweet and Fuzzy Needy Puppy" from Mococo!
subtitles.english: ...and "Sweet and Fuzzy Needy Puppy" from Mococo!

subtitles.original: ASMRボイスは、英語と日本語、両方で収録してます！
subtitles.english: The ASMR voices are recorded in both English and Japanese!

subtitles.original: My heart beats so fast! Be ready to blush when you take a listen to them! Ah!
subtitles.english: My heart beats so fast! Be ready to blush when you take a listen to them! Ah!

subtitles.original: The merch is separated into two sets: Fuwawa's Birthday Merch and Mococo's Birthday Merch!
subtitles.english: The merch is separated into two sets: Fuwawa's Birthday Merch and Mococo's Birthday Merch!

subtitles.original: If you purchase the Full Set, they come with bonuses, including a Cheki-style card with a special bonus voice!
subtitles.english: If you purchase the Full Set, they come with bonuses, including a Cheki-style card with a special bonus voice!

subtitles.original: グッズはフワワセットとモココセットに分かれています！
subtitles.english: The merch is split into a Fuwawa set and a Mococo set!

subtitles.original: セットごとにチェキ風カードと特典ボイスが付きます！
subtitles.english: Each set comes with a Cheki-style card and a bonus voice!

subtitles.original: The regular version will have a foil-stamped replica signature and message, so it'll be just as cute!
subtitles.english: The regular version will have a foil-stamped replica signature and message, so it'll be just as cute!

subtitles.original: 数量限定セットは直筆サイン入りだよ！
subtitles.english: The limited quantity set comes with a hand-written autograph!

subtitles.original: We put lots of love into each and every signature, so we hope you look forward to it!
subtitles.english: We put lots of love into each and every signature, so we hope you look forward to it!

subtitles.original: たくさんの愛情を込めてサイン書きますね！
subtitles.english: We'll put lots of love into writing the signatures!

subtitles.original: Please check out the Hololive Official Online Shop...
subtitles.english: Please check out the Hololive Official Online Shop...

subtitles.original: ぜひホロライブ公式ショップにチェックしてください！バウバウ！
subtitles.english: Please check out the Hololive Official Shop! Bau Bau!

subtitles.original: バウバウ！
subtitles.english: Bau Bau!

subtitles.original: What did you think of our birthday merch? Pretty cute, huh?
subtitles.english: What did you think of our birthday merch? Pretty cute, huh?

subtitles.original: Yeah!
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: The reservations are going on sale right after the Birthday Live here ends...
subtitles.english: The reservations are going on sale right after the Birthday Live here ends...

subtitles.original: So don't forget, okay?!
subtitles.english: So don't forget, okay?!

subtitles.original: 生誕のグッズの予約は...
subtitles.english: The birthday merch reservations...

subtitles.original: この後、開始しますので...
subtitles.english: ...will start right after this...

subtitles.original: お忘れずにチェックしてくださいね！
subtitles.english: ...so please don't forget to check them out!

subtitles.original: Yes! You can use the link below or on the side here!
subtitles.english: Yes! You can use the link below or on the side here!

subtitles.original: Don't forget, okay??
subtitles.english: Don't forget, okay?

subtitles.original: We put a lot of love into it, and Icomochi-mama too!
subtitles.english: We put a lot of love into it, and Icomochi-mama too!

subtitles.original: Right after this ends, time to go, go, go!
subtitles.english: Right after this ends, time to go, go, go!

subtitles.original: Go buy it!
subtitles.english: Go buy it!

subtitles.original: Wow, we performed modern special collab songs with our dear Senpais!
subtitles.english: Wow, we performed modern special collab songs with our dear Senpais!

subtitles.original: But there's still one mystery guest we haven't met yet, right??
subtitles.english: But there's still one mystery guest we haven't met yet, right?

subtitles.original: そう、まだ会ってない謎のゲストが一人いるんだよね！
subtitles.english: That's right, there's still one mysterious guest we haven't met yet!

subtitles.original: Well, should we give the Ruffians a hint first?
subtitles.english: Well, should we give the Ruffians a hint first?

subtitles.original: Ruffians, are you curious? Yeah!
subtitles.english: Ruffians, are you curious? Yeah!

subtitles.original: Could it be...
subtitles.english: Could it be...

subtitles.original: Yagoo-san?
subtitles.english: Yagoo-san?

subtitles.original: Yagoo-san?
subtitles.english: Yagoo-san?

subtitles.original: That's a good guess maybe, but...
subtitles.english: That's a good guess maybe, but...

subtitles.original: We'll see, huh?
subtitles.english: We'll see, huh?

subtitles.original: Maybe you should get ready...
subtitles.english: Maybe you should get ready...

subtitles.original: ...because you know, they aren't quite as bad as Pero...
subtitles.english: ...because you know, they aren't quite as bad as Pero...

subtitles.original: ...but they can get pretty nasty sometimes!
subtitles.english: ...but they can get pretty nasty sometimes!

subtitles.original: Mocochyan! You're not going to be rude to our next guest or anything, right?
subtitles.english: Mocochyan! You're not going to be rude to our next guest or anything, right?

subtitles.original: Especially before calling them out!
subtitles.english: Especially before calling them out!

subtitles.original: We'll see!
subtitles.english: We'll see!

subtitles.original: Well, let's get them out here then!
subtitles.english: Well, let's get them out here then!

subtitles.original: Could it be, could it be?!
subtitles.english: Could it be, could it be?!

subtitles.original: Okay!
subtitles.english: Okay!

subtitles.original: せーの、どうぞー！
subtitles.english: On three, please come in!

subtitles.original: わわわわ！来たしん！来たしんよ！来たしんよ！
subtitles.english: Wa-wa-wa-wa! I'm here! I'm here! I'm here!

subtitles.original: あーん、ちゅっ！
subtitles.english: Mwah!

subtitles.original: きゃあああ！ちゅっちゅ！
subtitles.english: Kyaaaa! Mwah mwah!

subtitles.original: 自己紹介お願いします！
subtitles.english: Please introduce yourself!

subtitles.original: クロちゃんです！わわわわー！
subtitles.english: It's Kuro-chan! Wa-wa-wa-wa!

subtitles.original: 来たしんよ！
subtitles.english: I'm here!

subtitles.original: はじめまして！
subtitles.english: Nice to meet you!

subtitles.original: チワワじゃないよ、フワワだよ！
subtitles.english: I'm not a Chihuahua, I'm Fuwawa!

subtitles.original: フワワじゃないよ、モココだよ！
subtitles.english: I'm not Fuwawa, I'm Mococo!

subtitles.original: 二人合わせて...
subtitles.english: The two of us together...

subtitles.original: フワモコです！バウバウ！
subtitles.english: We are Fuwamoko! Bau Bau!

subtitles.original: よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: It's a pleasure to meet you!

subtitles.original: フワモコのわちゃわちゃバースデーフェスティバルに来てくれてありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for coming to Fuwamoko's chaotic Birthday Festival!

subtitles.original: ハッピーバースデーだしんよ、フワモコ！
subtitles.english: Happy birthday, Fuwamoko!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: いいしんね！
subtitles.english: Very nice!

subtitles.original: ちょっとね、視聴者のラフィアンズもたくさんいると思いますけど...
subtitles.english: I'm sure there are many Ruffians watching right now, but...

subtitles.original: クロちゃんがどんな人なのか説明してもらえますか？
subtitles.english: Could you explain what kind of person you are, Kuro-chan?

subtitles.original: え？自分ですんの？これ！
subtitles.english: Eh? I have to do it myself?

subtitles.original: そうです！自己紹介！
subtitles.english: Yes! Self-introduction!

subtitles.original: わかったしんよ。だってこれ海外の人も見てますもんね？
subtitles.english: Understood. Since overseas people are watching too, right?

subtitles.original: 海外の人もわかる自己紹介しますからね。
subtitles.english: I'll do an intro that overseas people can understand.

subtitles.original: Nice to meet you, nice to meet you, chu, chu, chu, chu, tulip!
subtitles.english: Nice to meet you, nice to meet you, chu, chu, chu, chu, tulip!

subtitles.original: え、困らないで？
subtitles.english: Eh, don't look so troubled?

subtitles.original: え、クロちゃんは...チューリップ？
subtitles.english: Eh, Kuro-chan is... a tulip?

subtitles.original: チューリップ？No, no, no, no!
subtitles.english: A tulip? No, no, no, no!

subtitles.original: ちょっとまだわからないかもしれないから...
subtitles.english: Some people might still not understand, so...

subtitles.original: えーとね、安田大サーカスっていうトリオを組んでる、えーと、芸人さんで...
subtitles.english: Well, I'm a comedian in a trio called Yasuda Dai Circus...

subtitles.original: あと豆柴の大群のプロデュースもやってますだし、作詞とかもしてます、クロちゃんです！
subtitles.english: And I also produce Mameshiba no Taigun and write lyrics. I'm Kuro-chan!

subtitles.original: お、おー！
subtitles.english: Oh, wow!

subtitles.original: じゃあ今度は英語でお願いします！
subtitles.english: Then, this time, please do it in English!

subtitles.original: English!
subtitles.english: English!

subtitles.original: え？僕が？
subtitles.english: Eh? Me?

subtitles.original: Yes, 自分で！
subtitles.english: Yes, yourself!

subtitles.original: え、そんなこと急に言われたら、it's shy...
subtitles.english: Eh, if you say that so suddenly, I'm shy...

subtitles.original: Fuwawa...
subtitles.english: Fuwawa...
